name: project
description: Landing page with SEO, API docs, Docker, and SSO support

scripts.docker:run: docker run -p 8080:80 -e SSO_PROVIDER=github -e SSO_CLIENT_ID=$SSO_CLIENT_ID -e SSO_CLIENT_SECRET=$SSO_CLIENT_SECRET -e SESSION_SECRET=$SESSION_SECRET project
scripts.docker:start: npm run docker:build && npm run docker:run
